creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text:
fetch is unable to work with FTP via proxy-servers.
wget from the same machine is working nice.
fetch is working nice obly with http:// URLS.

How-To-Repeat: Get a fetch, squid, and an IP-acl which permits the IP of a fetch machine. Try to get some file from FTP.
